parameter_and_conf: 1906 — earlier than every other date and later than none
chain.thought: Explanation: The dates listed are 1906, 1907, 1907, 1908, 1910, 1911, and 1911. The first date is 1906. Comparing it to the others, 1906 is earlier than 1907, 1908, 1910, and 1911, and thus it is earlier than every other date and not later than any.
